column3: "Lemon Balm reduces stress and anxiety" refers to its ability as a herb to calm the body's responses that cause mental tension.
"Lemon Balm improves digestion" refers to its ability to aid the body's process of breaking down and utilizing food.
"Lemon Balm supports immune system" refers to its ability to aid and strengthen the body's natural defenses against illnesses.
"Lemon Balm relieves headaches and migraines" refers to its ability to alleviate pain associated with both conditions, offering relief for those suffering from them.
"Lemon Balm soothes sore throat and coughs" refers to its ability to alleviate discomfort due to a sore throat or cough by reducing inflammation.
"Lemon Balm eases muscle pain and spasms" refers to its ability to help relieve body stiffness, reduce aches, and relax tense muscles.
"Lemon Balm promotes sleep and insomnia relief" refers to its ability to help people fall asleep easily, feel rested during sleep, and get over any problems they might have sleeping or with insomnia.
"Lemon Balm enhances mood and emotional well-being" refers to its positive influence on someone's emotions and happiness by reducing stress levels or helping a person feel more at ease.

"Lemon Balm prevents allergic reactions" refers to its ability to ease inflammation or discomfort caused by an allergy, reducing symptoms like itching and sneezing when applied topically or consumed in tea form.
"Lemon Balm relieves symptoms of depression" refers to its ability to help reduce sadness and emotional distress associated with this mental health condition.
